remarks: HIGHEST AND BEST BY MONDAY 6-29-26 AT 6PM. Townhouse Living offers Comfort, Convenience & Community! Located in a beautifully maintained, pet-friendly complex, this charming 3 story townhouse offers an effortless lifestyle with exceptional amenities. Enjoy an in-ground pool, tennis/pickleball courts, playground & scenic walking paths throughout peaceful wooded grounds. HOA covers landscaping, snow removal, and trash/recycling for easy, low-maintenance living year-round. Inside, the inviting living room has a striking 2-sided fireplace, custom built-ins and gleaming hardwood floors. The kitchen & dining room showcase authentic 1700s broad-plank flooring reclaimed from the historic Westport Country Playhouse. Sliding doors in the dining area open to a private deck-perfect for relaxing or entertaining. The kitchen includes granite countertops, custom cabinetry, a butler's pantry, and a full appliance suite. A stylish half bath completes the main level. Upstairs, the spacious primary bedroom offers dual walk-in closets with flexible organization. A second bedroom also features hardwood floors. The full bath includes a granite vanity and vessel sink, plus a linen closet. A pull-down attic provides additional storage. Lower level includes a one-car garage & laundry with storage or finishing potential. Conveniently located near local schools, parks, shopping, major highways, South Norwalk & East Norwalk Metro-North stations. Close to SONO "AS IS"
